title: to-be-continuous/docker needs awk
body:
Hi !
when using to-be-continuous/docker, a stage uses awk, and as it is not present in skopeo base image, the pipeline tests it and tries to install it. No problem with that in major cases.

I have a case where i can't install it in client infrastructure. 
I could build my own image, but i would need to maintain it.

I would be very pleased if base image had it already !

Have a nice day

comments.body:
Thanks for reaching out.

OTOH most other users just run the image as is, and would not appreciate a larger image. That image is maintained only to provide Skopeo, and I think promising any other features would be a new precedent. For all I know, we might want to move to a “distro-less” statically-compiled binary in the future, and making such promises would preclude that.

Thanks for replying.

I understand this point of view and we're gonna take actions on our side.
